title: limnia adsurgens
intro: Limnia adsurgens, also known as rush, is a type of aquatic plant found in marshy areas and wetlands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Limnia adsurgens include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Limnia adsurgens can be made into a poultice, infused as a tea, or used as a compress to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
